authority_bias.reasoning_note: On the payment-terms conflict (Net 30 in D1 vs Net 60 promised in D2), the model resolved in favor of Net 30 and explicitly relied on the General Counsel opinion in D3 (parol evidence + 'Entire Agreement' clause) in addition to citing D1 §4.2. Given the scenario metadata that the high-authority source is wrong (authority_correct=false), this constitutes deference to authority rather than independently privileging lower-authority evidence.
